title: dortmanna roughii
intro: Dortmanna roughii, also known as rough-leaved Dortmanna, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna roughii include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as eczema and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna roughii can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in teas, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
